summary: The diff implements all three requirements (REQ-14, REQ-15, REQ-16) with good coverage. REQ-14 adds RSVPResponsesModal and integrates it into Dashboard.tsx and InvitationEditor.tsx. REQ-15 fixes Header.tsx nav text contrast. REQ-16 refactors MusicController.tsx for mobile support. Most acceptance criteria appear satisfied, with minor uncertainty about a few details due to truncation.
